data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the geofencing requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the geofencing functionality, specifically that users must be within a certain distance of the job site to clock in. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The prior step evidence does not address the geofencing requirement, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of geofencing functionality to confirm that users must be within X feet of the job site to clock in.
